summary: Iteration 52: P0 Sprint Testing - Admin Agency Modules, Agency Password Change, and Billing Visibility. All critical features verified: (1) Super admin can save agency modules via /api/admin/agencies/{id}/modules with full CRUD, (2) Saved modules correctly reflect in agency user sidebar navigation, (3) Password change endpoint validates current password, rejects weak passwords, and enforces policy, (4) Agency user billing link is hidden and direct URL access redirects to /app/settings.

minor.issue: Agencies with tenant_id=null are not found when user has tenant_id set. The with_tenant_filter does not handle null tenant_id values - only handles $exists: false. Affects agencies created without tenant_id.

passed_tests: Module updates persist via subsequent GET
Clear all modules (empty array) works correctly
Select all modules saves full list
Agency user cannot access admin module endpoints (401/403)
Password change with wrong current password rejected (400)
Password change with weak password rejected (422)
Password change with same password rejected (400)
Admin agency modules page loads with agency cards
Select All / Clear All buttons functional
Save modules button present and enabled
Agency settings page shows password change card with all fields
Billing link NOT present for agency user in settings nav
Direct navigation to /app/settings/billing redirects agency user to /app/settings
Agency sidebar reflects saved modules (limited modules hide unavailable items)
critical_code_review_comments: Good: AdminAgencyModulesPage has comprehensive data-testid coverage
Good: ChangePasswordCard implements full validation flow with clear user feedback
Good: SettingsBillingPage correctly redirects non-admin users via Navigate component
Good: AppShell.jsx properly filters sidebar navigation based on allowed_modules
Note: with_tenant_filter in base_repository.py doesn't handle tenant_id=null case (uses $exists:false only)
seed_data_creation: Reset agent@acenta.test password back to agent123 (was changed during previous test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 verified P0 sprint features: admin module management, agency password change, billing visibility. Key findings: (1) Module CRUD works with agencies that have matching tenant_id, (2) Empty allowed_modules array means all modules visible, (3) Password must meet strong policy (10+ chars, uppercase, number, special char), (4) Agent password was reset to agent123. Rate limiting is active (clear rate_limits collection before testing).
